shortFormVideo.hook: Your website may be getting traffic and still losing the lead in the first 10 seconds.
shortFormVideo.brief: 15-30 seconds. Open on a local business homepage. Show the above-the-fold promise, proof near the CTA, short form, fast follow-up promise, and internal links into local SEO/conversion content. End with the Melbourne Web Studio lead leak quiz.
shortFormVideo.caption: A lead generation website in Melbourne FL does not need more clutter. It needs a clear promise, proof, one low-friction next step, and follow-up before the buyer cools off.
